description:
A collection of Active Directory Tools to streamline Active Directory

Active Directory Pro Toolkit is an easy to use Active Directory Tools that makes managing Active Directory fast, easy and efficient. Automate tasks that are consuming your time and resources.
New Features
Section titled “New Features”
- Custom Report Builder — Create fully custom AD reports , available under My Reports in the Reports sidebar
- Select object type: Users, Computers, or Groups
- Select and reorder columns from a comprehensive attribute list
- Add optional filter conditions with operators: Is, Is Not, Contains, Starts With, Ends With, Is Empty, Is Not Empty
- Custom reports saved per-user and listed in the My Reports sidebar with Edit and Delete options
Bug Fixes
Section titled “Bug Fixes”
- No bug fixes in this release
